brief_justification: Paper A computes inflationary cosmological-collider correlators via nonperturbative de Sitter propagators, hypergeometric/Mellin-Barnes analytics, and a JWKB large-mass expansion of a squeezed bispectrum, whereas paper B is a deterministic traffic queueing/capacity analysis comparing FIFO vs directional-priority bottleneck policies for delay and oversaturated flow boundaries; there is no shared governing equation, transition, or transferable machinery, only the generic setting of physics-adjacent modeling.
